name: role-picker
description: Self-assign roles message. Pair with Modly's reaction-roles or button-roles module — this is just the prompt embed.

embeds.title: 🎭 Pick your roles
embeds.description:
Click a button below (or react with the matching emoji) to give yourself a role. Click again to remove it.

Roles control which channels you see, who pings you, and what events you hear about.

fields.name: 🎮 Gamer
fields.value: Access game-night pings + the LFG channels.

fields.name: 🎵 DJ
fields.value: Get pinged when someone starts a listen-along.

fields.name: 🆕 New here
fields.value: Mark yourself so the community can welcome you.

footer.text: Roles can be changed any time.
